examples.title: Algorithm: String Constructors
examples.code:
ALGORITHM StringConstructors
INPUT: value (character array or byte array or string)
OUTPUT: string object

BEGIN
 IF value is character array THEN
 CREATE string object from character array
 ELSE IF value is byte array THEN
 CREATE string object from byte array using default charset
 ELSE IF value is string THEN
 CREATE copy of string
 END IF
 RETURN string object
END
examples.explanation: Pseudocode shows how different string constructors work
